zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John d’Oyly II於1228年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯托克 道爾時，他的父親John d'Oyley of Raunton34歲，母親Rose de Dunston12歲。他於1290年12月與Johanna Knightely結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1314年在英國斯塔福爾享年86歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾藍頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John d’Oyly II于1228年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯托克 道爾时，他的父亲John d'Oyley of Raunton34岁，母亲Rose de Dunston12岁。他于1290年12月与Johanna Knightely结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1314年在英国斯塔福爾享年86岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾藍頓。

nameMeanings.name: d’Oyly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: variant of Olley with preposition d’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John d’Oyly II was born in 1228, in Stoke Doyle, Northamptonshire, England, his father, John d'Oyley of Raunton, was 34 and his mother, Rose de Dunston, was 12. He married Johanna Knightely in December 1290. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1314, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Ranton, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John d’Oyly II est né en 1228, à Stoke Doyle, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John d'Oyley of Raunton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Rose de Dunston, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Knightely en décembre 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1314, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Ranton, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John d’Oyly II 1228 in Stoke Doyle, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John d'Oyley of Raunton 34 und seine Mutter Rose de Dunston 12. Er hat im Dezember 1290 Johanna Knightely geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1314 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Staffordshire, England und wurde in Ranton, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John d’Oyly II è nato il nel 1228 nel Stoke Doyle, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, John d'Oyley of Raunton, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Rose de Dunston, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Knightely nel dicembre 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1314, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Ranton, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John d’Oyly IIが1228年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアストク ドイルで生まれた時，父John d'Oyley of Rauntonは34歳，母Rose de Dunstonは12歳であった。1290年12月にJohanna Knightelyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで86歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアラントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John d’Oyly II(이)가 1228년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스토크 도일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John d'Oyley of Raunton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Rose de Dunston(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1290년 12월 Johanna Knightely(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 랜턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John d’Oyly II nasceu em 1228, em Stoke Doyle, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John d'Oyley of Raunton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Rose de Dunston, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Knightely em dezembro de 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1314, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Ranton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John d’Oyly II родился в 1228 г. в местности сток доил, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John d'Oyley of Raunton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Rose de Dunston, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Knightely декабрь 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1314 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности рантон, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John d’Oyly II nació en 1228, en Stoke Doyle, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John d'Oyley of Raunton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Rose de Dunston, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Johanna Knightely en diciembre de 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1314, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Ranton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
